Title: Verify system architecture
Test Steps:
1. Observe the system components: Data organizer, Local user, Data display, Firebase, Realtime database, Authentication, Firebase database.
2. Verify the relationships between components.
Expected Result: All components are correctly connected as described in the UML diagram.

Title: Verify real-time data updates
Preconditions: System is running, data is updated in the Realtime database
Test Steps:
1. Update data in the Realtime database.
2. Observe the data display to verify if the updated data is reflected.
Expected Result: The updated data is displayed in real-time.

Title: Verify chat functionality
Preconditions: System is running, users are registered
Test Steps:
1. Create a chat between two users.
2. Send messages within the chat.
3. Verify that the messages are displayed correctly in the chat interface.
Expected Result: Messages are sent and received correctly within the chat.

Title: Verify user account information
Preconditions: System is running, users are registered
Test Steps:
1. Register a new user.
2. Update user information (nickname, password, pos_lat, pos_lon, tokens, rate).
3. Verify that the updated information is correctly saved and displayed.
Expected Result: User account information is saved and displayed correctly.

Title: Verify post creation and association
Preconditions: System is running, users are registered, fridges are available
Test Steps:
1. Create a post associated with a fridge.
2. Verify that the post is correctly associated with the user and fridge.
3. Verify that the post is displayed in the user's profile and fridge details.
Expected Result: The post is created, associated with the user and fridge, and displayed correctly.

Title: Verify fridge inventory and details
Preconditions: System is running, fridges are available
Test Steps:
1. Observe the fridge inventory and details.
2. Update fridge inventory and details.
3. Verify that the updated information is correctly saved and displayed.
Expected Result: Fridge inventory and details are saved and displayed correctly.

Title: Verify authentication functionality
Test Steps:
1. Attempt to log in with valid user data.
2. Attempt to log in with invalid user data.
3. Attempt to register a new user with valid data.
4. Attempt to register a new user with invalid data.
Expected Result: Valid user data allows successful login and registration, while invalid data results in appropriate error messages.

Title: Verify database operations
Preconditions: System is running, data is stored in the database
Test Steps:
1. Retrieve data from the database.
2. Update data in the database.
3. Delete data from the database.
4. Verify that the operations are successful and the data is correctly saved and retrieved.
Expected Result: Database operations are successful, and the data is saved and retrieved correctly.

Title: Verify fragment functionality
Preconditions: System is running, a fragment is created
Test Steps:
1. Create a fragment.
2. Update data within the fragment.
3. Verify that the updated data is correctly saved and sent to the Firebase Database.
Expected Result: The fragment functionality works correctly, and the updated data is saved and sent to the Firebase Database.
